jobDescription: Roblox is ushering in the next generation of entertainment, allowing people to imagine, create, and play together in immersive, user-generated worlds. We’re the one and only fastest-growing entertainment platform that lets anyone teach themselves how to code, publish, and monetize any experience imaginable—across any device—reaching millions of players across the globe. The impact that you can have at Roblox is powerful. We’re looking for someone who’s eager to take on a meaningful role in the success of Roblox on a massive scale. Someone who takes play seriously, but also isn’t afraid to have some fun either. Someone who’s ready to take Roblox—and their career—to the next level. In 2018, we were honored to be recognized as a Certified Great Place to Work®. We’ve fostered a company culture that empowers people to do the most defining work of their career in an environment that’s made up of the most passionate, team-oriented, visionary, crazy-smart people you’ll ever meet. Join the Roblox team where play rules and the possibilities are endless. Roblox is searching for an Employee Relations ( ER) Manager to help build and establish ER investigation practices at Roblox.  We’re looking for an individual with deep ER expertise as this individual will be instrumental in developing the framework and operating principles of ER at Roblox and support the overall employee experience. The successful candidate will provide guidance and make recommendations to resolve ER matters and ensure our practices are supporting the mission and values of our rapidly growing organization. This role will partner closely with our HRBPs and provide subject matter expertise in addressing ER matters. Responsibilities: Conduct investigations and address employee issues and complaints working in partnership with the HRBPs and Legal to make recommendations on appropriate courses of action. Design and implement an ER framework, including strategies to drive continuously improving ER practices within the company. Manage and maintain HR procedures and practices to ensure compliance, enhance the employee experience and promote our company values. Assess employment risk in coordination with HR leadership and Legal based on current regulatory landscape and anticipated changes. Ensure cases are handled fairly and consistently in a timely fashion, and in line with company values and applicable laws. Counsel HR and business leaders on ER issues, trends and risks to foster sound business decisions. Develop, socialize and rollout ER processes, guidelines and practices. Maintain an accurate, organized and confidential case management system. Analyze ER trends to develop solutions and strategies and make recommendations based on ER related data. Requirements: Bachelor’s degree required; Advanced Degree preferred7+ years of Employee Relations/ Human Resources managing investigations Excellent written and oral communication skills Expert knowledge of ER, labor relations, federal, state and local laws that govern employment practices Deep understanding of FMLA, EEO laws, ADA and other employment-related state and federal laws & regulations Self-starter who can manage with limited supervision and direction as this person can operate and drive results and set priorities independently Strong analytical skills Ability to be discreet and maintain confidentiality Thrives in a fast-paced, high growth environment You'll Love: Excellent medical, dental, and vision coverage A rewarding 401k program Flexible vacation policy Free catered lunches five times a week and several fully stocked kitchens with unlimited snacks Onsite fitness center and fitness program credit Annual Cal Train Go Pass A Roblox Admin badge for your avatar
